patch:
--- a/mux_logic.v
+++ b/mux_logic.v
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 module mux_32bit (
   input [31:0] data_in_0,
   input [31:0] data_in_1,
   input [1:0] sel,
   output reg [31:0] data_out
 );
 
-  always @(data_in_0) begin
+  always @(*) begin
     case (sel)
       2'b00: data_out = data_in_0;
       2'b01: data_out = data_in_1;
       default: data_out = 32'h0;
     endcase
   end
